title: Extensions
description: Extensions is a mod that extenses certain parts of Minecraft!
body:
--Extensions is a mod that extenses certain parts of Minecraft! it currently adds:--

--Club--
(Club is a weapon that has knockback, but also has low durability and low damage.)

--Storage Blocks--
-Flint Block-
(If has fire on it, the fire will burn forever, just like netherrack.)
-Stick Bunch-
-Bamboo Bunch-
-Blaze Rod Bunch-
-Rotten Flesh Block-

--Flowers--
-Lavender-
-Buttercup-
-Carnation-
(Generates on dark biomes and mountain biomes)
-Dusty miller-
(Generates on dry biomes)

--Food Items--
-Honey Bread-
-Apple Bread-
(Gives regeneration)
-Golden Apple Bread-
(Gives golden apple effects)
-Sweet Berry Bread-
-Cocoa Bread-

--Decorations--
-Rib-
(Rib will drop from skeleton mobs. If a wolf kills a skeleton mob, it's chance to drop a Rib will be higher.)
-Stout Bone-
(Stout Bones drop from skeleton mobs. If a wolf kills a skeleton mob, it's chance to drop Stout Bones will be higher.)
-Tall Dead Bush-
(Only generates in badlands biomes.
Guaranteed to drop at least one stick.)
-Starfish-
(Starfishes will spawn at ocean and beach biomes.
Can be turned into blocks.)

--Structures--
-Bone Pile-
(Generates on desert & badlands biomes.)

--Rotten Planks--
(Rotten Planks can replace normal planks in lush caves and dripstone caves.
If an entity steps on top of Rotten Planks, it will get damaged. If an entity steps on top of a Damaged Rotten Planks, it will get perished and then break.
Rotten Planks can be turned into Reinforced Rotten Planks, which doesn't get damaged.)

--Turkish Translation--
